jokes: Excerpt from First Full Length Play
happiness: The Pursuit Of Happiness As First Philosophy Preface

fun_facts.title: Deeply Inspired
fun_facts.subtitle: As A Data Scientist
bullets: I believe that data science has the power to reduce the amount of labor required for people to afford their needs.
I'm ready to invest myself into a career serving customers in the best way I can with my life.

fun_facts.title: Fun Loving
fun_facts.subtitle: As Well As Professional
bullets: I played Tennis in college, but my friends tend to prefer going to Top Golf.
Connecting with collegues over lunch and some laughs is my favorite leisure activity.

fun_facts.title: Romantic Comedy Writer
fun_facts.subtitle: On The Side
bullets: Even though they can be pretty cheesy, the type of comedies I love are shows like How I Met Your Mother, The Office, and The Big Bang Theory.
I've learned so much about consumer behavior from studying how to write for TV.
"There's nothing that sells stuff like television. Nothing." -Lorne Michaels

personality.title: Funny
personality.description: I love comedy and sold a play last year. I see comedy as a means to friendship and to creating inclusive work environments.

personality.title: Energetic
personality.description: I'm the type of person who makes people wonder how I do it all. This year alone, I had my play produced, I had my essays reviewed by UTSA's Philosophy professors (this old boy's still got it), and I commited myself to a career in Data Analytics.

timeline.title: Declared my Majors
timeline.description: Met with professors during office hours and discovered the depth of my passion for diagnosing large-scale systemic issues, leading me to explore those ambitions before reconsidering a career as a physician.

timeline.title: Graduated high school in Boerne, TX
timeline.description: Grew up as a band nerd in the Baritone section and member of my youth group.

timeline.title: Interned at Methodist Emergency Room in Boerne for a year
timeline.description: Discovered my passion for helping people, quick paced problem-solving, and analytical thinking through my high school's pre-med track and internship.

data-scientist.title: Data Scientist
data-scientist.bio_text: I'm Harper—a multidisciplinary creator bridging the worlds of narrative structure, quantitative analysis, and education. As a professional data scientist and creative writer, my intellectual and creative passions are fulfilled by the books and goals that I come home to each night, and I am excited by having a career that will allow me to come home to those passions each night for the rest of my life.

timeline.title: UT Data Science and Business Analytics Post-Grad
timeline.description: Engaged in weekly discussions with professor to acquired high-level proficiencies in Python, Machine Learning, and Tableau, learning to directly apply predictive modeling to core business challenges.

timeline.title: Led A New Initative at Northwest Vista College
timeline.description: Performed data analysis on the student population, studied time management and organization strategies, and developed digital media to promote the program.

timeline.title: Completed a 300 page rough draft of my analytical philosophy
timeline.description: After reading all the books recommended to me by professors, I was able to organize my thoughts on how brains search for the essence of happiness. That's when I realized the good that data analysis could do for the world to help people find what they are searching for.

timeline.title: Earned a Bachelors in Physics from Southwestern University
timeline.description: Primarily studied the physical science's most advanced mathematical methods that the department's course catalog had to offer with a particular interest in Advanced Fourier Series Transforms and their applications to methods of artificial transcription and intelligence.

timeline.title: Worked as a Data Analyist at Southwestern University
timeline.description: Applied analytical skills in a professional university setting, managing data sets and extracting foundational insights from weather ballon data from across Texas.

skills.title: Python
skills.subtitle: Supervised Learning, Ensemble Methods, Unsupervised Learning
skills.description: Alongside my certificates from IBM, Google, and Meta, I applied my knowledge in discussions with my professor and through my projects at UT.

skills.title: Data Management
skills.subtitle: SQL & Web Scraping
skills.description: As part of the program at UT, I learned SQL and was inspired to get a certificate from IBM to explore the full potential of what I could do with Data Analytics and data scraped from the internet.

timeline.title: Watched the team I served perform my play
timeline.description: Wrote, sold, and guided actors and directors in the production of my original play by The Overtime Theater in San Antonio for a four-weekend run.

timeline.title: Submitted my final draft of Thirteen Roses to The Overtime Theater
timeline.description: After a year of serious commitment to creative exploration and major life decisions, I finished my best play yet.

timeline.title: Spent a year volunteering at The Boerne Community Theatre
timeline.description: Became a member of the theater community in my hometown while I embarked on a journey of self-discovery.

timeline.title: Studied The Dramatic Arts at Northwest Vista College
timeline.description: Took a semester to explore one of my passions at a more affordable school with a nevertheless well-funded Fine Arts facilities and to study under the best director in San Antonio.

timeline.title: Organized Playwriting Festival
timeline.description: Coordinated, wrote for, and performed in a playwriting festival for new works at Southwestern University.

timeline.title: Won the King Creativity Grant and produced short films
timeline.description: Pitched and wrote 5 science fiction short films, "The Imaginary Horizon Series," and came up with a budget and documented strategy for how to produce said films.

timeline.title: Studied Film and Acting as well as Differential Equations at Northwest Vista College
timeline.description: While waiting for the COVID-19 pandemic to end and for Classical Mechanics to be offered once more, I took advantage of some cheap tuition and made some friends along the way.

skills.title: Digital Media Production
skills.subtitle: Final Cut, Canva, Logic
skills.description: Through my film courses at Northwest Vista College, Southwestern University, and NYU, I became familiar with how to create digital content for posts, flyers, and films.

timeline.title: Became a member of Staff Senate at Northwest Vista College
timeline.description: Assumed a leadership position by representing the interests of my fellow staff members to the senate.

timeline.title: Created a series of workshops on the logic of Comedies at Northwest Vista College
timeline.description: I put together interactive activities, slideshows, and informative handouts to help students think about comedy analytically and to serve some function.

timeline.title: Started working as a writing tutor at Northwest Vista College
timeline.description: Honed expert-level communication skills, mastering the ability to explain complex, structural concepts to diverse audiences clearly and effectively.

timeline.title: Started work as a physics tutor at Southwestern University
timeline.description: Guided university students through high-level scientific and mathematical frameworks, reinforcing my own quantitative expertise.

timeline.title: Started a high school quidditch team
timeline.description: From the very beginning, I have been a fun-loving leader, getting together a group of 20 students to watch and play a game of quidditch together and corrdinating a match with another school.

skills.title: Productivity Suites
skills.subtitle: Google, Microsoft, Apple
skills.description: As a professional writing tutor and student who can handle a heavy courseload, I am very familiar with all of the word prcessors, spreadsheets, and slide decks.

skills.title: Web Development
skills.subtitle: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
skills.description: As a personal passion and subscriber to Coursera with certificates from IBM, Google, and Meta, I create websites with ease and have begun learning how to build my own apps.

timeline.title: Studied Senior Seminar Contemporary Philosophy at UTSA
timeline.description: Took contemporary analytical philosophy course as well as a contemporary continental philosophy course to see how well I understand and how my way of thinking compares to that of the contemporary.

timeline.title: Earned a Bachelors in Philosophy from Southwestern University
timeline.description: Wrote a capstone on the value of the liberal arts education in a nominally democratic nation where students can take it upon themselves to read, write, and use mathematics as life-long learners.

skills.title: Technical Writing
skills.subtitle: Grammar, Scientific, Stylized
skills.description: I developed a mastery of how to perform technical writing as a Professional Writing Tutor at Northwest Vista College, as a liberal arts student, and as a paid freelance technical editor for graduate students completing their dissertations.
